hook.text: The host nation was humiliated in the semifinal of their own World Cup. The scoreline was unbelievable.

buildup.text: Brazil 2014. The hosts were favorites, playing at home with a nation of 200 million behind them.

discovery.text: Germany scored five goals in 18 first-half minutes. The Brazilian defense simply collapsed.

twist.text: The final score—7-1—became an internet meme and a permanent scar on Brazilian football history.

climax.text: Fans wept in the stadium. It remains the worst defeat by a host nation in World Cup history.

punchline.text: Seven goals in one half shattered a nation's dream.

quiz.question: How many goals did Germany score in the first half against Brazil in 2014?
